compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create /dso:onboarding SKILL.md with Socratic dialogue engine
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md implementing a Socratic dialogue engine for project understanding.

### Requirements:
1. Valid frontmatter (name: onboarding, description, user-invocable: true)
2. SUB-AGENT-GUARD (Orchestrator Signal variant)
3. Internal checklist of 7 understanding areas (stack, commands, architecture, infrastructure, CI, design, enforcement preferences)
4. Socratic dialogue loop — one question at a time, multiple-choice preferred
5. Call project-detect.sh for grounded detection with CoVe
6. Maintain scratchpad file via append-only writes to temp file
7. At completion, offer to invoke /dso:architect-foundation
8. Follow brainstorm/SKILL.md Socratic dialogue pattern as reference

### .test-index
Update entry to remove RED marker after tests pass GREEN.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (create)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md exists and is non-empty
  Verify: test -s plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] .test-index has entry without RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && ! grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — RED tests exist) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created /dso:onboarding SKILL.md with Socratic dialogue engine, 7 understanding areas, scratchpad, detection integration
